form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 8 at Newcastle All Weather on March 6 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Yorkshire Glory carrying 61kg at $6.50. The start before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on February 24 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Operation Gimcrack with 58.5kg at $4.30. Key runner on his best form and can feature in the finish.
